name: Seafood Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper to taste.
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Drain and flake 1 can (6 1/2 oz.) tuna; use instead of shrimp if desired.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cooked pasta, shrimp or flaked tuna, diced green pepper, sliced carrots, and zucchini.
4. Add white wine worcestershire sauce, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper; toss lightly to combine.
5. Refrigerate at least 30 minutes before serving.
